name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Are you going to the party?

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump Declares Day of Mourning for President George H.W. Bush
body:
"President Trump declared Wednesday a national day of mourning for former President George Herbert Walker Bush..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c6e0f41c36&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump Declares Day of Mourning for President George H.W. Bush**

“President Trump declared Wednesday a national day of mourning for former President George Herbert Walker Bush, who died Friday at the age of 94,” Courtney McBride and Michael Wright report for _The Wall Street Journal_.

“President Trump said Mr. Bush inspired generations of Americans to public service,” they add. “Along with his full life of service to country, we will remember President Bush for his devotion to family—especially the love of his life, Barbara,” the President said in a statement with First Lady Melania Trump.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=25dd363ee3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Trump honored the victims of the October shooting at the Tree of Life Synagogue as he marked the start of Hanukkah and denounced the hatred that Jews still face,” Melissa Quinn reports in the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4a68db9840&e=3ee4985eea)_. “As one nation, we pledge our continued love and support for the victims, their families, and the community, and we pray that the victims’ families find some measure of peace and comfort during this holiday season,” the President said in his Hanukkah message to Americans.
---
|
---
| “U.S. President Donald Trump was able to extract a number of concessions from Chinese President Xi Jinping in exchange for not imposing any new tariffs on Chinese goods,” Jason Hopkins writes in _[The Daily Caller](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dc7d800bde&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Xi agreed to immediately begin buying more agricultural products from American farmers, along with a pledge to purchase more industrial and energy products.”
---
|
---
| “Palestinians deserve more from their leadership than political statements and bargaining positions,” U.S. Special Representative for International Negotiations Jason Greenblatt writes in _[The National](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c7296f6c57&e=3ee4985eea). _“Over the past 22 months, we have focused on a comprehensive peace plan for the Israeli-Palestinian conflict. We are hopeful that Israel and the Palestinians will engage with the Trump Administration’s plan.”
---
|
---
| In _[MarketWatch](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=237d25d57c&e=3ee4985eea)_ , University of Maryland economist Peter Morici writes that through President Trump’s tax cuts and deregulation, American wages are getting a boost. “After a decade of frustration, workers’ pay appears to be rising faster than inflation. Private-sector wages were up 3.1% in the third quarter from a year earlier, well ahead of consumer price inflation.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fc7cdab69d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=005b073b96&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=9ff1302487)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Happy Hanukkah
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | We all have our favorite part of the holidays. The food. The presents. The decorations. My favorite part is the extra time I get to spend with family and friends. This time of year truly reminds me of how many blessings I have in life, including the honor of representing the constituents in Florida's 23rd Congressional District. Tonight is the second night of Hanukkah, the Jewish festival of lights. For those who are celebrating, I wanted to take a moment to say Happy Hanukkah, from my family to yours. |
---
P.S.: A few years ago, we started a tradition on Team DWS: sharing a holiday recipe. Today's is a healthy spin on a classic: Healthy Root Vegetable Latkes, straight from my kitchen to yours. Follow me on Instagram @CleanCookingCongresswoman! Enjoy!
**Healthy Root Vegetable Latke Recipe (Adapted from MyRecipes.com)**
_INGREDIENTS_
2 cups grated peeled sweet potato
2 cups grated peeled baking potato
1 cup grated peeled parsnip
3 ounces all-purpose flour (about 2/3 cup)
1/2 teaspoon ground cumin
1/2 teaspoon kosher salt, divided
2 large eggs
1 cup grated onion
2 tablespoons olive oil, divided
1 tablespoon chopped dill (optional)
3 tablespoons water
1 tablespoon extra-virgin olive oil
1/4 teaspoon kosher salt
1/8 teaspoon ground red pepper
_DIRECTIONS_
1\. Preheat oven to 325°.
2\. Place first 3 ingredients on paper towels; squeeze until barely moist. Weigh or lightly spoon flour into dry measuring cups; level with a knife. Combine flour, cumin, 1/4 teaspoon salt, eggs, and onion in a bowl; beat with a mixer at medium speed until blended. Add potato mixture; beat with a mixer at low speed until combined.
3\. Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add 2 teaspoons oil; swirl. Heap 3 tablespoons potato mixture into pan to form a patty; flatten slightly. Repeat procedure 5 times to form 6 patties. Reduce heat to medium-low; cook 6 minutes on each side or until golden brown. Place latkes on a baking sheet; keep warm in oven. Repeat procedure twice with remaining oil and potato mixture to yield 18 latkes total. Sprinkle latkes with 1/4 teaspoon salt. Garnish with dill, if desired.

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
